articles.author: Jagmeet Singh
articles.title: Vertu wants CEOs to run companies from an AI foldable starting at $6,880 - TechCrunch
articles.description: Built on top of the open-source Hermes project, Vertu's new foldable combines AI-agent workflows, enterprise integrations, and ultra-premium luxury finishes.
articles.content: Luxury smartphone brand Vertu on Thursday unveiled a foldable phone powered by an AI agent that connects with enterprise software and coordinates workflows. The company is targeting executives who ma… [+5432 chars]
